sections.title: Overview
sections.promptHint: One paragraph: what this spec covers, the problem it solves, and the key design constraints. Include a link to the related PRD or ticket if applicable.

sections.title: Architecture
sections.promptHint: Describe the system architecture. Include a Mermaid diagram showing components, data flow, and key interfaces. Describe each component's responsibility in 1–2 sentences. If relevant, include a sequence diagram for the primary flow.
sections.ragQuery: architecture components services data flow system design

sections.title: Data Models
sections.promptHint: Define the key entities and their schemas. Use tables or TypeScript interfaces. Include: field name, type, required/optional, description. Show relationships between entities.
sections.ragQuery: data models schema entities fields relationships database

sections.title: API Contracts
sections.promptHint: Define all APIs being built or consumed. For each endpoint: method, path, request shape, response shape, status codes, and authentication requirements. Use code blocks for request/response examples.
sections.ragQuery: API endpoints routes request response schema authentication

sections.title: Dependencies
sections.promptHint: List external services, libraries, and infrastructure this system depends on. For each: name, purpose, version or contract assumed, and what happens if it is unavailable.

sections.title: Security Considerations
sections.promptHint: Cover: authentication and authorization model, sensitive data handling, threat vectors considered, and any compliance requirements (PII, HIPAA, SOC 2 controls). Note what is explicitly out of scope for security.
sections.ragQuery: security authentication authorization data privacy compliance threat

sections.title: Testing Strategy
sections.promptHint: Define what is tested at each layer: unit tests (what logic), integration tests (what contracts), E2E tests (what user flows). Specify coverage targets where relevant. Note what is explicitly not tested and why.

sections.title: Deployment & Rollout
sections.promptHint: Describe how this ships: feature flags used, migration steps (schema changes, data backfills), rollback procedure, and monitoring/alerting required at launch.
